name: Divided Turntable Black Wire with Natural Wood - Brightroom™
description:
Store everyday items on a countertop while keeping them easily accessible with this Wire Divided Turntable with Natural Wood from Brightroom™. This divided turntable has a round silhouette that makes it ideal for organizing condiments in the refrigerator and household items in the bathroom cabinet. This decorative storage basket has a open black wire design with wooden base that adds a new level of stylish convenience to your home. Simply spot or wipe clean to keep it looking great.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.

Dimensions:
Top and Bottom: 11-inch diameter
Overall height: 3.75 inches
Interior height: 2.5 inches
Interior top and bottom: 10.5-inch diameter
